description: The video displays a classical painting of a royal coronation scene while the narrator explains how Odysseus's pride in revealing his name to the Cyclops led to a curse from Poseidon | An animated map tracks Odysseus's ten-year voyage across the sea, visually pinpointing the floating island of Aeolia where the transcript notes he dined with King Aeolus unaware of Poseidon's curse. (objects: Animat
when_to_use: (draft) beats functioning as evidence — review the source span and author the roles
